reviews.review_description:
So my thoughts, I believe the game is easier and more fun because the main goal has been added in. Thanks for adding in the fuse lol And I hope I can see a new update or perhaps a new project.
Get Saving our orbit.

reviews.review_title: love it but it was hard
reviews.review_description: i really like the concept but they should definitely make the controls easier it took me 30 minutes to learn how to fly the ship

Im moving backwards and i cant 
stop its making the game unplayable ill rate it 5 stars but please fix it
